name: linco
tagline: Empowering Motor Control with Intelligent SoC Solutions
description: Linco (Linko Semiconductor) is a national high-tech enterprise specializing in motion control integrated circuits and total solutions. The company focuses on motor control SoC chips, gate drivers, and power management ICs for BLDC motor applications.
longDescription: Linco (Linko Semiconductor) is a leading Chinese semiconductor company dedicated to motion control and motor drive applications. Founded in 2016, the company has established itself as a key player in the motor control MCU market with its proprietary LKS series chips. Linco's product portfolio includes motor control SoCs, gate drivers, and power management ICs, serving applications in home appliances, electric tools, automotive electronics, and industrial control. The company's chips integrate high-performance CPU cores, dedicated DSP for motor control, high-speed ADCs, and programmable gain amplifiers, providing complete one-chip solutions for BLDC motor control. With AEC-Q100 certified automotive-grade products and comprehensive development ecosystems, Linco is committed to enabling efficient, reliable, and cost-effective motor control solutions for customers worldwide.

coreProducts.name: Motor Control MCUs
coreProducts.description: High-performance 32-bit MCUs with integrated DSP, ADC, and analog front-end for BLDC motor control applications

coreProducts.name: Automotive Grade MCUs
coreProducts.description: AEC-Q100 certified motor control MCUs for automotive applications including HVAC, cooling fans, and power systems

coreProducts.name: Gate Drivers
coreProducts.description: High and low voltage gate drivers with integrated protection features for MOSFET and IGBT power stages

coreProducts.name: Power Management ICs
coreProducts.description: Integrated power management solutions including LDOs, DC-DC converters, and voltage regulators for motor drive systems

industries.name: Home Appliances
industries.description: Motor control solutions for air conditioners, refrigerators, washing machines, and kitchen appliances

industries.name: Automotive Electronics
industries.description: Automotive motor control for electric pumps, cooling fans, HVAC systems, and electric vehicle applications

industries.name: Electric Tools
industries.description: High-performance motor control for cordless drills, angle grinders, and garden tools

industries.name: Industrial Control
industries.description: Motor drive solutions for industrial fans, pumps, compressors, and automation equipment

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor of Linco products?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong is an authorized distributor of Linco (Linko Semiconductor) products. We provide genuine Linco motor control MCUs, automotive-grade chips, gate drivers, and power management ICs with full technical support. As an authorized distributor, we maintain strategic inventory of popular Linco products including the LKS03, LKS05, LKS07, and LKS32AT series for quick delivery. Our FAE team has extensive experience with Linco motor control solutions and can provide application guidance, debugging support, and reference design assistance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong sales for Linco product inquiries, samples, and technical support. We can help you select the right Linco MCU for your motor control application.

faqs.question: What are the core competitive advantages of Linco motor control MCUs?
faqs.answer: Linco motor control MCUs offer several competitive advantages: (1) High integration - integrating CPU, DSP, ADC, PGA, and gate drivers in a single chip, reducing BOM cost and PCB size; (2) Dedicated motor control DSP - proprietary DSP core optimized for FOC and BLDC algorithms with 100ns trigonometric operations; (3) Rich analog peripherals - instrument-grade differential programmable gain amplifiers and high-speed ADCs for precise current sensing; (4) Automotive-grade quality - AEC-Q100 certified products for demanding automotive applications; (5) Cost-effective pricing - competitive pricing compared to international brands while maintaining high performance; (6) Complete ecosystem - comprehensive development tools, reference designs, and technical documentation.
faqs.decisionGuide: Consider Linco MCUs for cost-sensitive motor control applications requiring high integration and performance. Contact our FAE team for comparison with other motor control solutions.

faqs.question: How do Linco products compare to international brands like TI and STMicroelectronics?
faqs.answer: Linco products offer competitive alternatives to international brands: (1) Performance - Linco MCUs with 96MHz CPU + dedicated DSP provide comparable motor control performance to TI C2000 and STM32 series; (2) Integration - higher integration with built-in gate drivers and analog front-end reduces external components compared to discrete solutions; (3) Cost - typically 20-40% lower pricing than equivalent international brands; (4) Support - local technical support in Chinese and faster response times; (5) Ecosystem - comprehensive motor control libraries and reference designs; (6) Quality - AEC-Q100 automotive certification meets same standards as international brands. For many BLDC motor applications, Linco provides equivalent functionality at better value.
faqs.decisionGuide: Evaluate Linco for cost-sensitive applications or when local support is important. Our FAE team can provide detailed comparisons for your specific application requirements.

faqs.question: What are the advantages of purchasing Linco products through LiTong?
faqs.answer: Purchasing Linco products through LiTong offers multiple advantages: (1) Genuine products - guaranteed authentic Linco chips with full traceability; (2) Technical support - experienced FAE team with deep knowledge of Linco motor control solutions; (3) Application guidance - assistance with MCU selection, algorithm development, and debugging; (4) Reference designs - access to proven motor control reference designs and code libraries; (5) Fast delivery - strategic inventory of popular Linco products; (6) Competitive pricing - volume discounts and flexible payment terms; (7) Local service - Chinese language support and local technical seminars; (8) Development tools - evaluation boards and debugging tools available.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong for Linco product quotes, samples, and technical support. We can help accelerate your motor control product development.

faqs.question: What applications are Linco motor control MCUs best suited for?
faqs.answer: Linco motor control MCUs are optimized for various BLDC motor applications: (1) Home appliances - air conditioner compressors, refrigerator fans, washing machine drum motors; (2) Automotive - HVAC blowers, engine cooling fans, oil pumps, water pumps, electric power steering; (3) Electric tools - cordless drills, angle grinders, garden tools requiring high-speed motor control; (4) Industrial - industrial fans, pumps, compressors, servo drives; (5) Drones and robotics - high-speed motor control for propulsion systems; (6) New energy - solar tracking systems, energy storage cooling. The LKS series supports sensorless FOC, trapezoidal BLDC, and stepper motor control with integrated protection features.
faqs.decisionGuide: Share your motor control application requirements with our FAE team for Linco MCU selection guidance and reference design recommendations.

faqs.question: Does Linco provide automotive-grade motor control solutions?
faqs.answer: Yes, Linco offers comprehensive automotive-grade motor control solutions through the LKS32AT series. These AEC-Q100 Grade 1 certified MCUs are designed for demanding automotive applications with: (1) Wide temperature range -40°C to +150°C operation; (2) High reliability - qualified per automotive standards with PPAP documentation; (3) Integrated features - 6N gate drivers, LIN PHY, 5V LDO for reduced BOM; (4) Automotive peripherals - LIN/CAN interfaces, diagnostic features, safety mechanisms; (5) Proven applications - HVAC systems, cooling fans, pumps, active grille shutters, charging port actuators; (6) ISO 26262 support - functional safety documentation available. The LKS32AT037/039/085/086 series covers various automotive motor control requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our automotive FAE team for LKS32AT series selection, qualification documentation, and automotive reference designs.

faqs.question: What development tools and support does Linco provide?
faqs.answer: Linco provides comprehensive development ecosystem: (1) IDE support - Keil MDK and IAR Embedded Workbench with device packs; (2) Development boards - evaluation kits for all LKS series with motor power stages; (3) Software libraries - complete motor control algorithm libraries including FOC, BLDC, and stepper control; (4) Reference designs - proven designs for air conditioners, washing machines, power tools, automotive fans; (5) Debugging tools - J-Link support, real-time debugging, and motor control visualization tools; (6) Documentation - detailed datasheets, user manuals, application notes; (7) Training - online tutorials, technical seminars, and hands-on workshops; (8) Community support - active developer community and technical forums.
faqs.decisionGuide: LiTong provides Linco development tools and reference designs. Contact us for evaluation kit availability and software library access.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Linco MCU for my motor control application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right Linco MCU involves considering: (1) Motor type - BLDC PMSM, BLDC trapezoidal, or stepper motor; (2) Control algorithm - sensorless FOC, sensored FOC, or six-step commutation; (3) Performance requirements - CPU speed (48MHz to 192MHz), DSP capabilities; (4) Analog requirements - ADC resolution (12-bit to 14-bit), PGA gain ranges; (5) Integration needs - built-in gate drivers, power management, communication interfaces; (6) Application environment - consumer, industrial, or automotive (AEC-Q100); (7) Package preference - QFN, LQFP options; (8) Cost target - LKS03 for cost-sensitive, LKS07/LKS08 for high performance. LiTong's FAE team can analyze your requirements and recommend the optimal Linco MCU.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong FAE with your motor specifications and application requirements for personalized Linco MCU selection guidance.
